name: python3-ufolib2
title: python3-ufolib2
description:
Unified Font Object (UFO) fonts library
ufoLib2 reads and writes Unified Font Object (UFO) files.
UFO is a file format that stores fonts source files.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-ufolib2 because Unified Font Object (UFO) fonts library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-ufolib2 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-ufolib2 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-ufolib2 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
